title: Localization Executor Schema
description: Generate localization message files and TypeScript CLDR data modules

messagesDir.description: Directory containing locale message JSON files (e.g., en.json, de.json)

messageTemplate.description: Path to the Lodash template file for UMD message generation

messageOutputDir.description: Output directory for generated dx.messages.{locale}.js files

generatedTemplate.description: Path to the Lodash template file for TypeScript exports

cldrDataOutputDir.description: Output directory for CLDR data TypeScript modules

lintGeneratedFiles.description: Run ESLint with auto-fix on generated TypeScript files

skipCldrGeneration.description: Skip CLDR TypeScript generation (only generate message files)

skipMessageGeneration.description: Skip message file generation (only generate CLDR TypeScript files)

applyLicenseHeaders.description: When provided, applies DevExtreme license headers to the executor output. Defaults the target directory to messageOutputDir; override via targetSubdir.
